rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Robin Hellsten, Patrik Olson, Amata Anantaprayoon
rule_metadata.title: Qakbot/Pikabot Payload Download

rules.rule_text:
title: Qakbot/Pikabot Payload Download
id: 295c3545-5461-4067-9676-1eb137d8c601
status: test
description: Request towards url matching Qakbot/Pikabot payload pattern. Typically
  leads to download of .zip file containing a .js or .msi payload
references:
- https://malpedia.caad.fkie.fraunhofer.de/details/win.pikabot
- https://github.com/pr0xylife/Qakbot/blob/main/Qakbot_bmw01_25.01.2024.txt
author: NTT Security - Robin Hellsten, Patrik Olson, Amata Anantaprayoon
date: '2023-05-23'
modified: '2024-01-26'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|re: ^/[a-z]{2,8}/$
    c-uri-query|re: ^(1|[0-9]{4,8})/{0,}$
  filter:
  - c-uri: ''
  - c-uri-query: ''
  - action: B
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Legit urls not downloading files
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial_access
